task_objective: Replace subprocess-based process tree discovery (_process_tree) with direct /proc filesystem reads to eliminate fork+exec overhead on the game launch/exit critical path
design_decisions: Read /proc/[pid]/status instead of /proc/[pid]/stat because the stat file embeds the command name in parentheses which can contain spaces, making positional parsing fragile
Added _read_ppid helper with proc_root keyword argument for testability without monkeypatching
_read_ppid returns early on first PPid: line found — does not read entire status file
Catches OSError and ValueError to handle vanished processes (TOCTOU races) and malformed status files
Removed import subprocess since it was only used by _process_tree
results: All 245 tests pass. Ruff check, ruff format, and ty check all clean.
